title: Dec 17-24 short readings (data/texts/decemberShortReadings.json)
description: Short-reading overrides for the 'greater ferias'/O Antiphon stretch, Dec 17-24, keyed by day-of-December (as a string). Distinct from proper-of-seasons because romcal's celebration key for these days isn't stable year to year - see SOURCES.md, 'Advent/Lent proper short readings'. Resolved by calendar date (src/decemberShortReadings.ts), the same way data/texts/oAntiphons.json is resolved by date rather than by key. Only the Hours actually overridden need to be present; a missing Hour falls back to whatever proper-of-seasons/ferial citation would otherwise apply. Sunday is excluded at resolution time in favour of that Sunday's own proper-of-seasons file, not modeled here.
